title: Secure Auth System
description: A full-stack authentication system with JWT tokens, refresh token rotation, role-based access control (ADMIN / USER), and Spring Security integration. Includes login, registration, and protected route handling.

title: REST API Dashboard
description: A feature-rich REST API with CRUD operations, pagination, filtering, and a responsive frontend dashboard for real-time data management. Built with clean layered architecture (Controller → Service → Repository).

title: Quiz Application
description: A dynamic quiz platform with category-based questions, timed sessions, randomized 10-question delivery, instant visual feedback, and detailed score analytics. Deployed on Render with FastAPI backend and React frontend.

title: Employee Management System
description: A comprehensive HR management system built with Spring Boot enabling full CRUD operations on employee records, department management, and report generation with a clean responsive UI.
